description_long: This is a cylindrical ceramic vase with a wide, slightly flared rim and a narrow base. The exterior is primarily a pale, off-white color, adorned with faded reddish-brown decorative patterns that appear to be inspired by traditional or ancient motifs. The surface shows significant wear, with large sections of the decorative pattern missing or abraded, revealing the plain ceramic beneath. The rim is thick and rounded, and the body features subtle horizontal ridges near the base. The interior is unglazed and matches the exterior's pale tone. The overall appearance suggests age and historical significance, possibly as an artifact or decorative piece.
description: A worn, cylindrical ceramic vase with faded reddish-brown patterns on a pale background and a wide, flared rim. Large areas of the decoration are missing, revealing the plain ceramic beneath.
description_view_0: Front view shows the most intact section of reddish-brown decorative patterns and the wide, rounded rim.
description_view_1: This side reveals a large, undecorated area where the pattern has worn away, exposing the plain ceramic.
description_view_2: Back view displays mostly plain ceramic with only faint remnants of the original pattern near the base.
description_view_3: This angle shows fragmented patches of the reddish-brown pattern and more exposed ceramic surface.
